headline: Is First Solar’s Domestic Manufacturing Edge Now Central To The FSLR Investment Narrative?
summary: In recent days, attention on First Solar has intensified as the company prepared to release its first-quarter 2026 results and hosted an investor call reviewing past performance and current conditions. At the same time, market commentators and institutional voices have highlighted the company’s role as a U.S.-based solar manufacturer amid shifting trade and policy conditions. Amid renewed focus on First Solar’s position in utility-scale solar, influential investors and media commentators...

headline: Susquehanna Maintains Positive Rating on First Solar (FSLR)
summary: First Solar, Inc. (NASDAQ:FSLR) is one of the 10 Best Stocks to Buy for the Next Decade. On April 8, 2026, Susquehanna lowered its price target on First Solar, Inc. (NASDAQ:FSLR) to $250 from $280 previously and maintained a Positive rating on the shares as part of a broader update to estimates ahead of Q1 […]
